reference: Hi, I am thirty-four years old. We have shifted to Dubai about a month ago. I started having a skin rash and itching for the past four to five days. It appears, and after some hours, it disappears. I am taking Cetirizine. After taking the tablet, it reduces, but again the next day the rash appears. What is the solution?
text: Hi, I am thirty-four years old. We have shifted to Dubai about a month ago. I started having a skin rash and itching for the past four to five days. It appears and after some hours it disappears. I am taking cetirizine. After taking the tablet, it reduces, but again the next day the rash appears. What is the solution?
